name: Oatmeal Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large microwave-safe bowl on HIGH for 45 seconds.
2. Stir in oats, sugar, syrup, and salt.
3. Press evenly into the bottom of an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking pan.
4. Microwave on HIGH for 3-4 minutes until bubbly.
5. Spread surface even and sprinkle chocolate chips over all.
6. Microwave on MEDIUM for 4-6 minutes until chocolate is melted.
7. Spread out evenly and sprinkle chopped nuts all over top.
8. Chill for 1 hour and cut into bars.
